---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2022 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Employements

1.  Firm Aselsan, position Product Planner, year 2025-2026

2.  Firm TAI, position Product Planner, year 2024-2025

## Internships

1.  Firm Roketsan, position Project Management Intern, year 2025

2.  Firm HIDROMEK, position Data Logistics Intern, year 2024

# Projects

Graduation Project with Roketsan: Leadership Developement Robot with AI support

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python, SAP, MS Office Programs, AutoCAD

# Hobbies

Reading Books, Swimming, Hanging Out With Friends, Watching Movies

If you want further information about me, you can [check my CV here](CV.pdf) \<3.
